opportunities.label: Online Scheduling Automation
opportunities.signal: Phone-only contact with no booking tool detected on site or GMB.
opportunities.observation: After-hours plumbing calls in Boise go unanswered, sending leads to competitors.
opportunities.fix: Deploy AI booking assistant to capture and schedule jobs 24/7 without staff.

opportunities.label: Call Capture CRM
opportunities.signal: No CRM or marketing tools detected; phone-only contact is the sole intake method.
opportunities.observation: Every unbooked or missed call leaves zero record, killing follow-up and revenue recovery.
opportunities.fix: Implement AI call logging and CRM capture to save every caller's info automatically.

opportunities.label: Review Response Automation
opportunities.signal: 163 Google reviews at 4.4 stars with no detected owner response pattern.
opportunities.observation: Unanswered reviews signal poor engagement, hurting Boise-area search ranking and trust.
opportunities.fix: Automate personalized Google review responses triggered immediately after each new review posts.
